meta.title: Assessing the Obama Doctrine in the Middle East ─ What Next?
meta.description: Senator Lindsey Graham gave remarks at a panel on the Middle East featuring Robert Satloff, Amb. Eric Edelman, Michele Dunne, and Michael Doran.
